description: Fetch and summarize the latest arXiv papers based on this config.

_mode_descriptions.direct: Fetches the abstract directly from https://arxiv.org/abs/{paper_id} — fast, metadata-only.
_mode_descriptions.abstract: Fetches the full HTML page from https://arxiv.org/html/{paper_id} and generates a brief 2-3 sentence summary.

instructions._note: These instructions tell Claude how to execute the task. Edit them to change behavior without touching the Cowork prompt.
instructions.step_1_fetch: For each category in 'categories', visit https://arxiv.org/list/{category}/new and collect paper IDs (format YYMM.NNNNN) from today's new submissions.
instructions.step_2_filter: From collected papers, keep only those whose title or abstract snippet fuzzy-matches at least one keyword from 'keywords'. Fuzzy matching rules: (1) case-insensitive, (2) match morphological variants (e.g. 'model' matches 'models', 'modeling', 'modelling'), (3) match sub-word/token occurrences (e.g. 'VLA' matches 'VLA-based', 'OpenVLA'), (4) match semantically equivalent phrasings (e.g. 'world model' matches 'world models', 'world-model', 'model of the world'), (5) match common abbreviations and acronyms when the keyword is their expansion or vice versa. Deduplicate papers appearing in multiple categories.

step_3_details.direct: For each matching paper, visit https://arxiv.org/abs/{paper_id}. Extract: title, full author list, and the abstract as-is.
step_3_details.abstract: For each matching paper, visit https://arxiv.org/html/{paper_id}. Read the full page and write a brief 2-3 sentence summary in your own words (do NOT copy the abstract verbatim).

instructions.step_4_format_authors: Format authors using 'author_display' settings: show the first N authors (max_first), then ellipsis, then the last M authors (max_last). If total authors <= max_first + max_last, show all without ellipsis.
instructions.step_7_report: After saving, print a short summary: how many papers found, how many matched keywords, the output file path, and a quick preview of the top 5 titles.
